name: Triple Whale
description: Triple Whale — E-commerce analytics platform aggregating Shopify, ad, and attribution data into a single dashboard.

seo.title: Triple Whale — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Triple Whale: Triple Whale — E-commerce analytics platform aggregating Shopify, ad, and attribution data into a single dashboard.

when_to_use: E-commerce analytics aggregating Shopify, ads, and attribution
Post-purchase attribution without cookies via Triple Whale
MER and ROAS dashboards combining all ad spend in one view
Cohort analysis for DTC brands on Shopify storefronts
Revenue and margin analytics for fast-growing e-commerce brands

pros: Unifies Shopify, Meta, Google, TikTok data
AI summaries save manual reporting time
cons: Pricing scales fast with ad spend tiers
Attribution model is proprietary and opinionated
Not a fit outside Shopify ecosystem
Data freshness can lag during ad platform outages
review.verdict: The default analytics layer for Shopify DTC brands, but it's a reporting tool, not a true backend.
review.best_for: Shopify DTC brands spending heavily on Meta/Google/TikTok ads
review.not_for: B2B SaaS, marketplaces, or non-Shopify ecommerce stacks
